title: thymus hirtus subsp. fontqueri
intro: Thymus hirtus subsp. fontqueri is a subspecies of the thyme plant, a low-growing, flowering perennial native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Thymus hirtus subsp. fontqueri include its ability to aid digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy. Thymus hirtus subsp. fontqueri can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
